title: ConcernEntry
description: P-VS-08 (Stand-aside verdict) concern. When verdict=APPROVE_WITH_CAVEATS, the concern is recorded with severity_grade per Sheeran 1983 §5.3 (whisper / voice / weight). Concerns flow forward into next dispatch's caveats_embedded, after the cacheable prefix.

text.description: ≥30-char description of the concern. Plain language; not jargon.

severity_grade.description: Sheeran 1983 §5.3 grades. whisper = noted in passing, didn't block. voice = articulated and present in the record, recorded in fairness. weight = strongly felt, did not rise to blocking but the dissenter wants it noted as load-bearing.

dispatch_id.description: ID or path of the dispatch where this concern was raised.

raised_by_role.description: Role that raised the concern (researcher, evaluator, cross-family judge, etc.).

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when concern was raised.
